chart_reasoning_case.system_prompt: You are a careful visual evaluation assistant. Answer with only the requested token and no explanation.
chart_reasoning_case.user_prompt: Inspect the chart image. Which quarter has the highest bar? Reply with only one token: Q1, Q2, Q3, or Q4.

watermark_detail_case.system_prompt: You are a precise detail inspection assistant. Return only the requested hidden code with no extra text.
watermark_detail_case.user_prompt: Inspect the document image carefully. What is the hidden watermark code? Reply with only the code.
